message:
Command `
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== COMPREHENSIVE STATE CHECK $(date) ==="

echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'

echo ""
echo "=== Step 72 complete ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== state_out.json? ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS!" || echo "Does NOT exist"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/or_metrics_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "or_metrics EXISTS!" || echo "no or_metrics"

echo ""
echo "=== New steps? ==="
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5

echo ""
echo "=== flow.log tail ==="
tail -20 "$RUN_DIR/flow.log"

echo ""
echo "=== error.log tail ==="
tail -10 "$RUN_DIR/error.log"

echo ""
echo "=== librelane process status ==="
LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$LIBPID" ] && echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID still running" || echo "LibreLane has exited"

echo ""
echo "=== process_stats ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.process_stats.json" 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.

{"command": "
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== COMPREHENSIVE STATE CHECK $(date) ==="

echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'

echo ""
echo "=== Step 72 complete ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== state_out.json? ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS!" || echo "Does NOT exist"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/or_metrics_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "or_metrics EXISTS!" || echo "no or_metrics"

echo ""
echo "=== New steps? ==="
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5

echo ""
echo "=== flow.log tail ==="
tail -20 "$RUN_DIR/flow.log"

echo ""

tail -10 "$RUN_DIR/error.log"

echo ""

[ -n "$LIBPID" ] && echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID still running" || echo "LibreLane has exited"

echo "=== process_stats ==="

", "timeout": 20}

extras.command:
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== COMPREHENSIVE STATE CHECK $(date) ==="

echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'

echo ""
echo "=== Step 72 complete ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== state_out.json? ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS!" || echo "Does NOT exist"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/or_metrics_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "or_metrics EXISTS!" || echo "no or_metrics"

echo ""
echo "=== New steps? ==="
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5

echo ""
echo "=== flow.log tail ==="
tail -20 "$RUN_DIR/flow.log"

echo ""
echo "=== error.log tail ==="
tail -10 "$RUN_DIR/error.log"

echo ""
echo "=== librelane process status ==="
LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$LIBPID" ] && echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID still running" || echo "LibreLane has exited"

echo ""
echo "=== process_stats ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.process_stats.json" 2>/dev/null
